Mixed martial arts events
2019 in Road FC
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
First dateFebruary 23, 2019
Events
Fights
Chronology
2018 in Road FC 2019 in Road FC 2020 in Road FC

The year 2019 was the 10th year in the history of the Road Fighting Championship, a mixed martial arts promotion based in South Korea. 2019 starts with Road FC 052.

Road FC $1 Million Dollar Lightweight Tournament 'Road To A-Sol' Bracket

Road FC 055

Event chronology
Road FC 054 Road FC 055 Road FC 056

Goobne mall Road FC 056 was a mixed martial arts event held by Road Fighting Championship on September 8, 2019 at the Daegu Gymnasium in Daegu, South Korea.

Background

[edit]

The event featured the first title defense for Road FC Featherweight Champion Jeong-Yeong Lee against fellow countryman Hae-Jin Park as the Road FC 55 headliner.

Results

[edit]

Road FC 052

[edit]
Road FC 052
Information
PromotionRoad Fighting Championship
DateFebruary 23, 2019
VenueJangchung Gymnasium
City Seoul
Event chronology
Road FC 051 XX Road FC 052 Road FC 053

Goobne mall Road FC 052 was a mixed martial arts MMA event held by Road FC on February 23, 2019, at the Jangchung Gymnasium in Seoul, South Korea.[15][16][17][18]

Background

[edit]

The event featured the ROAD FC $1 Million Lightweight Tournament finals between Shamil Zavurov and Mansour Barnaoui to earn a shot at reigning lightweight champion A-Sol Kwon and the US$1 million prize.

Fight card

[edit]
Main card
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
-70.0 kg Lightweight Mansour Barnaoui def. Shamil Zavurov KO (flying knee) 3/3 0:30 [a]
-61.5 kg Bantamweight Min Woo Kim def. Je Hoon Moon Submission (triangle choke) 1/3 2:15 [b]
-70.0 kg Lightweight Bruno Miranda def. Young Gi Hong TKO (puches) 1/3 2:45
-61.5 kg Bantamweight Ik Hwan Jang def. Dae Young Jang Decision (unanimous) 3/3 5:00
-80.0 kg Catchweight Seung Yeon Kim def. No Joo Gi KO (punch) 1/3 0:07
Openweight Michel Pereira def. Dae Sung Kim TKO (knee) 2/3 1:02
Young guns 041
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
-80.0 kg Middleweight Hae Jun Yang def. Dong Hwan Lim Submission (scarf hold armlock) 1/2 2:40
-64.0 kg Catchweight Sang Jin Jung def. Seung Min Shin TKO (knee) 2/2 1:15
-65.5 kg Featherweight Tae Sung Kim def. Jung Gi Hong TKO (kick) 2/2 3:52
-61.5 kg Bantamweight Chang Hwan Hwang def. Sung Soo Lee TKO (puches) 2/2 3:56
-60.0 kg Catchweight Soo Wan Park def. Jung Hyun Lee Decision (split) 2/2 5:00
  1. ^ Road FC $1 Million Lightweight Tournament final
  2. ^ For the vacant Road FC Bantamweight Championship

[19]
